mapper.select: select user_id, copper_coins, reputation_score, last_checkin_date, completed_tasks, failed_tasks, create_time, update_time from biz_backpacker_profile where user_id = #{userId}
mapper.update: update biz_backpacker_profile set copper_coins = copper_coins + #{amount}, update_time = sysdate() where user_id = #{userId}
update biz_backpacker_profile set last_checkin_date = #{checkinDate}, update_time = sysdate() where user_id = #{userId}
update biz_backpacker_profile set reputation_score = least(200, greatest(0, reputation_score + #{delta})), update_time = sysdate() where user_id = #{userId}
update biz_backpacker_profile set completed_tasks = completed_tasks + 1, update_time = sysdate() where user_id = #{userId}
update biz_backpacker_profile set failed_tasks = failed_tasks + 1, update_time = sysdate() where user_id = #{userId}
mapper.insert: insert into biz_reputation_log (user_id, delta, score_after, reason, ref_id, remark, create_time) values (#{userId}, #{delta}, #{scoreAfter}, #{reason}, #{refId}, #{remark}, #{createTime})
